message: Log in to TikTok (pick any method — phone/email, QR, Google, etc.). After login, TikTok should either (a) show a consent screen with 'Ai-Bible-Gospels' app name + scopes (=APPROVED), or (b) redirect to the GitHub Pages callback (=APPROVED), or (c) show an error page (=NOT approved). You DON'T need to click Approve. Once you see any of those three outcomes, the URL bar should change — this script will auto-detect and continue. Timeout: 10 min.
